title: Guarantee of Rights, Freedoms and Responsibilities
chapterTitle: Bill of Rights, Freedoms and Responsibilities

content.text: This Bill of Rights, Freedoms and Responsibilities is a cornerstone of democracy in the Cayman Islands.
It enshrines the rights and freedoms to which every person in the Cayman Islands is entitled, and imposes responsibilities upon those persons.

notes: Establishes the Bill of Rights as foundational to Cayman Islands democracy.
